target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Catastrophic structural failure visible; turret and hull extensively fragmented; major components blown off; unrepairable condition consistent with K-kill

summary: One military equipment target assessed: DESTROYED, CONFIRMED. The scene depicts a single tank with catastrophic structural damage, its turret and hull extensively fragmented and major components blown off, lying in a field. The functional impact is complete loss of combat capability for the target.
